flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Southern University at New Orleans are 28% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($34.0k vs $47.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Southern University at New Orleans fell 44% between 2021 and 2024 (7.8% → 4.4%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southern University at New Orleans fell 31% between 2021 and 2024 (19.0% → 13.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 25% at Southern University at New Orleans vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.1k vs 1.5k).
